人.name: Person
人.mnemonic: A side view of a human. Becomes '亻' (Single Standing Person) on the left.

亻.name: Person (Side)
亻.mnemonic: The 'Single Standing Person' radical. Used in words like 'You' (你) and 'He' (他).

口.name: Mouth
口.mnemonic: A square depicting an open mouth. Used for eating, speaking, or entrances.

女.name: Woman
女.mnemonic: A pictogram of a woman kneeling or sitting gracefully.

日.name: Sun
日.mnemonic: A rectangular sun with a central sunspot or beam of light.

月.name: Moon
月.mnemonic: A crescent moon. Often represents 'Flesh' (Body Parts) in characters like 'Stomach' (胃).

木.name: Wood
木.mnemonic: A tree with a central trunk, roots at the bottom, and branches at the top.

水.name: Water
水.mnemonic: Ripples in a stream. Becomes '氵' (Three Drops) when used as a component.

氵.name: Three Drops
氵.mnemonic: Three splashes of water. The component form of Water (水).

火.name: Fire
火.mnemonic: Flames rising from a central point.

灬.name: Four Dots (Fire)
灬.mnemonic: Four flames underneath a pot. The bottom form of Fire (火).

土.name: Earth
土.mnemonic: A sprout growing out of the ground.

心.name: Heart
心.mnemonic: A diagram of the heart's chambers. Used for emotions and thoughts.

忄.name: Vertical Heart
忄.mnemonic: The standing form of Heart (心). Used for feelings like 'Fast' (快) or 'Fear' (怕).

手.name: Hand
手.mnemonic: The lines of a palm or five fingers.

扌.name: Hand (Side)
扌.mnemonic: The 'Pick-up Hand' radical. Used for actions like 'Hit' (打) or 'Push' (推).

一.name: One
一.mnemonic: A single horizontal stroke representing the number one or the horizon.

十.name: Ten
十.mnemonic: A cross representing all directions (N-S-E-W), symbolizing completeness.

宀.name: Roof
宀.mnemonic: A roof with a chimney. Used for buildings and safe places like 'Home' (家).

目.name: Eye
目.mnemonic: A vertical eye with a central pupil.

足.name: Foot
足.mnemonic: A leg with a foot at the bottom. Used for walking and kicking.

讠.name: Speech
讠.mnemonic: Sound waves coming from a mouth. The simplified form of 'Speech' (言).

饣.name: Food
饣.mnemonic: A covered food container. The simplified form of 'Eat' (食).

彳.name: Step
彳.mnemonic: The left half of a footprint or road. Used for walking and distance.

辶.name: Walk
辶.mnemonic: A foot walking along a road. Used for movement like 'Go' (去) or 'Far' (远).

纟.name: Silk
纟.mnemonic: Twisted silk threads. Used for textiles, colors, and connections.

艹.name: Grass
艹.mnemonic: Two sprouts of grass growing upwards. Always appears at the top.

父.name: Father
父.mnemonic: A hand holding a stone axe, representing the patriarch.

儿.name: Child
儿.mnemonic: Two legs of a running child.

大.name: Big
大.mnemonic: A person stretching their arms wide to say 'It was this big!'

小.name: Small
小.mnemonic: A seed split into tiny grains.

门.name: Gate
门.mnemonic: Two door panels standing side by side.

工.name: Work
工.mnemonic: A carpenter's square or ruler used for measuring work.

刂.name: Knife (Side)
刂.mnemonic: The standing form of Knife (刀). Used for cutting actions.

力.name: Power
力.mnemonic: A flexing bicep or a plow used in fields.

贝.name: Shell
贝.mnemonic: A cowrie shell, used as ancient currency. Found in words for buying and selling.

雨.name: Rain
雨.mnemonic: Drops of water falling from a cloud/sky.

山.name: Mountain
山.mnemonic: Three peaks of a mountain range.

石.name: Stone
石.mnemonic: A rock falling from a cliff.

广.name: Shelter
广.mnemonic: A lean-to shelter built against a cliff.

尸.name: Body
尸.mnemonic: A person lying down curled up.

车.name: Car
车.mnemonic: A cart view from above with wheels.

巾.name: Towel
巾.mnemonic: A piece of cloth hanging from a rod.

衣.name: Clothes
衣.mnemonic: A garment with a collar and sleeves.

衤.name: Clothes (Side)
衤.mnemonic: The component form of Clothes (衣). Don't confuse with 'Show' (礻)!

白.name: White
白.mnemonic: A sun rising, making everything clear and white.

立.name: Stand
立.mnemonic: A person standing firmly on the ground.

走.name: Run
走.mnemonic: A person (土 = body) running with a moving foot (no, actually Earth + Stop).

田.name: Field
田.mnemonic: A field divided by irrigation channels.

囗.name: Enclosure
囗.mnemonic: Walls surrounding a city or space. (Larger than Mouth 口).

匕.name: Spoon
匕.mnemonic: A ladle or a person sitting.

冫.name: Two Drops
冫.mnemonic: Two drops of water freezing into ice.

竹.name: Bamboo
竹.mnemonic: Two stalks of bamboo with leaves.

禾.name: Grain
禾.mnemonic: A stalk of grain with the head drooping down.

风.name: Wind
风.mnemonic: The wind blowing an insect (worm) around.

耳.name: Ear
耳.mnemonic: An ear attached to the head.

身.name: Body
身.mnemonic: A pregnant woman, representing the physical body.

欠.name: Yawn
欠.mnemonic: A person kneeling with mouth open (yawning).

户.name: Door
户.mnemonic: A single door panel (half of a gate 门).

弓.name: Bow
弓.mnemonic: A curved bow ready to shoot.

矢.name: Arrow
矢.mnemonic: An arrow flying through the air.

钅.name: Metal
钅.mnemonic: Gold buried in the earth. The component form of 金.

金.name: Gold
金.mnemonic: Gold nuggets hidden under the earth.

皿.name: Dish
皿.mnemonic: A bowl or plate for food.

玉.name: Jade
玉.mnemonic: Three pieces of jade on a string (King 王 + a dot).
